dashboard.title: {orgName} Dashboard
dashboard.empty_message: Your dashboard will show usage stats and team activity once you set up provider keys.

api_keys.title: API Keys
api_keys.description: Personal API keys for accessing LLM models through Cursor, Continue.dev, Claude Code, and other tools.
api_keys.no_org_keys: No API keys in this organization
api_keys.revoke_confirm: Are you sure you want to revoke this API key? This cannot be undone.

key_created.title: API Key Created
key_created.description: Copy your API key now. You won't be able to see it again.
key_created.warning: Make sure to copy your API key. You won't be able to see it again!

rate_limits.rpm_help: Maximum number of requests per minute. Leave empty for no limit.
rate_limits.tpm_help: Maximum number of tokens per minute. Leave empty for no limit.

onboarding.add_provider_key: Add your first LLM provider key

members.title: Members
members.description: Manage your organization's team members and invitations.
members.remove_confirm: Are you sure you want to remove this member? This cannot be undone.

provider_keys.title: Provider Keys
provider_keys.description: Add your LLM provider API keys to enable AI access for your team
provider_keys.access_denied_hint: Only organization owners and admins can manage provider keys.
provider_keys.no_keys_hint: Add your first LLM provider key to get started.
provider_keys.label: Label
provider_keys.remove_confirm: Are you sure you want to remove this provider key? This cannot be undone.

usage.title: Usage
usage.description: Monitor API usage, costs, and token consumption across your organization.
usage.no_data_hint: Usage data will appear here once team members start making API requests.

budget.title: Budget
budget.description: Set spending limits and budget controls for your organization.
budget.warning_banner: You are approaching your budget limit.
budget.exceeded_banner: Budget limit exceeded. API requests may be blocked.

defaults.title: Budget Defaults
defaults.description: Set default budget limits for organization members.

models.title: Models
models.description: Available AI models from your connected providers.
models.no_models_hint: Add a provider key to see available models and pricing.
models.no_search_results_hint: No models match your search. Try a different query.

cache_ttl.title: Cache TTL
cache_ttl.description: How long to cache API responses.

smart_routing.title: Smart Routing
smart_routing.description: Automatically route simple requests to cheaper models.

org_create.title: Create Organization
org_create.subtitle: Set up your team workspace to start sharing AI access.
org_create.description_placeholder: A brief description of your organization

validation.name_too_long: Name must be 50 characters or less
validation.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address
validation.password_min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.slug_invalid: Slug must contain only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens

errors.key_not_in_org: API key not found in this organization
errors.only_owner_change_role: Only the owner can change roles
errors.only_admins_revoke_keys: Only owners and admins can revoke keys
errors.only_admins_rate_limits: Only owners and admins can update rate limits
errors.generic: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

landing.meta_title: StarAIGateway - Enterprise AI Gateway | Share AI Access With Your Team
landing.meta_description: Pool API keys across your team instead of buying per-seat subscriptions. Budget controls, smart routing, and usage tracking built in.
landing.hero_subtitle: Share AI access with your team. Save 40-60% on LLM costs.
landing.hero_description: Pool API keys across your team instead of buying per-seat subscriptions. Budget controls, smart routing, and usage tracking built in.
landing.features_heading: Everything you need to manage team AI access
landing.feature_byok_desc: Add your OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and other API keys. Your team shares access without sharing credentials.
landing.feature_budget_desc: Set hard and soft spend limits per member and per team. Budgets reset monthly on your schedule.
landing.feature_routing_desc: Automatically route simple queries to cheaper models and complex ones to premium models. Save without thinking.
landing.feature_usage_desc: See who is using what, how much it costs, and where the money goes. Per-member and per-model breakdowns.
landing.feature_cache_desc: Identical queries return cached responses instantly. Reduce API calls and latency for repeated questions.
landing.feature_tools_desc: Drop-in compatible with Cursor, Continue.dev, Claude Code, and any tool that speaks the OpenAI API.
landing.cost_heading: Stop paying for seats nobody uses
landing.cost_savings: Save up to 60% on AI costs
landing.selfhost_description: Self-host StarAIGateway with Docker Compose. Your data stays on your servers.

login.title: Log in to your account
login.oauth_error: Sign in failed. Please try again.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.success: Check your email to verify your account. You can then log in.

forgot_password.title: Forgot your password?
forgot_password.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgot_password.success: If an account exists with that email, we've sent a password reset link.

verify_email.success_description: Your email has been verified. You can now log in.

invite.invalid_title: This invitation is no longer valid
invite.invalid_description: The invitation may have expired or already been used. Please ask the organization admin to send a new invitation.
invite.invited_by: {inviter} has invited you to join {org} as a

oauth_confirm.title: Confirm Account Link
oauth_confirm.description: An account with your email already exists. Enter your password to link your {provider} account.

integration_guide.title: Integration Guide
integration_guide.description: Connect your tools to StarAIGateway using the API key above.
